data/maps/MossdeepCity_Gym/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_GymGuideAdvice:
Yo, how's it going, CHAMPION-bound
{PLAYER}?\pThe GYM LEADERS here use PSYCHIC-type
POKéMON.\pIf you go up against them with
FIGHTING- or POISON-type POKéMON,\lthey'll inflict horrible damage!\pPlus, they'll come at you with
outstanding combination attacks.\pIf you want to win, you'll need to show
them how tight you are with your\lPOKéMON. Go for it!
data/maps/MossdeepCity_Gym/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_GymGuidePostVictor: Wow, you're astounding!\nYou're one great TRAINER!
data/maps/MossdeepCity_Gym/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_PrestonIntro: Battles hinge on the strength of your\nspirit! The weak-spirited will never win!
data/maps/MossdeepCity_Gym/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_PrestonDefeat: I lost! I must temper my spirit again!
data/maps/MossdeepCity_Gym/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_PrestonPostBattle: The indecisive lose.\nThat's my warning to you.
data/maps/MossdeepCity_Gym/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_VirgilPostBattle: If there are prodigies in the world,\nthen our GYM LEADERS are them!\pHowever, you may be even more talented\nthan them...
data/maps/MossdeepCity_Gym/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_FritzIntro: Fufufufu... Watch me levitate a POKé\nBALL telekinetically!\pWrooooooooaaaar!\n... ... ... ... ... ... ...\pSometimes, I'm out of sync...
data/maps/MossdeepCity_Gym/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_FritzDefeat: My POKéMON battling skills are out\nof sync, too!
data/maps/MossdeepCity_Gym/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_FritzPostBattle:
A POKé BALL was too heavy to lift
psychically. But this dust bunny...\pWhoooooooooooooooh!
... ... ... ... ... ...\pNo, I'm not cheating!
I didn't blow on it! Honestly!
data/maps/MossdeepCity_Gym/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_HannahIntro: When you lose to me, don't be too hard\non yourself.\pIt's not that you're weak - I'm just\ntoo strong!
data/maps/MossdeepCity_Gym/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_HannahPostBattle: I'm not going to get down on myself for\nlosing. I just need to train harder.\pPositive thinking - that's my strong\npoint!
data/maps/MossdeepCity_Gym/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_SamanthaIntro: I see it...\nI see your future...\pIf you can beat me, I will tell you\nyour future!
data/maps/MossdeepCity_Gym/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_SamanthaPostBattle: You will wage a terrifically intense\nbattle with our GYM LEADERS...\pThe result...\nYou won't hear it from me!
data/maps/MossdeepCity_Gym/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_MauraIntro: The roads you have traveled...\nWhat you have experienced...\pCome at me with everything you've\nlearned!
data/maps/MossdeepCity_Gym/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_MauraDefeat: You've traveled a path of greatness!
data/maps/MossdeepCity_Gym/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_MauraPostBattle: A bright future awaits those who have\nworked diligently.\pFor those who lazed idly, there is\nonly despair at the end.\pWhat goes around comes around...
data/maps/MossdeepCity_Gym/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_TateAndLizaIntro:
TATE: Hehehe... Were you surprised?\pLIZA: Fufufu... Were you surprised?\pTATE: That there are two GYM LEADERS?
LIZA: That there are two GYM LEADERS?\pTATE: We're twins!
LIZA: We're twins!\pTATE: We don't need to talk because...
LIZA: We can each determine what...\pTATE: The other is thinking...
LIZA: All in our minds!\pTATE: This combination of ours...
LIZA: Can you beat it?
data/maps/MossdeepCity_Gym/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_TateAndLizaDefeat: TATE: What?! Our combination...\nLIZA: Was shattered!\pTATE: It can't be helped. You've won...\nLIZA: So, in recognition, take this.
data/maps/MossdeepCity_Gym/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_ReceivedMindBadge: {PLAYER} received the MIND BADGE\nfrom LIZA and TATE.
data/maps/MossdeepCity_Gym/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_ExplainMindBadgeTa: TATE: The MIND BADGE enhances the\nSP. ATK and SP. DEF of POKéMON.\pLIZA: It also lets you use the HM move\nDIVE outside of battle.\pTATE: You should also take this, too.
data/maps/MossdeepCity_Gym/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_ExplainCalmMind:
TATE: That TM04 contains...
LIZA: CALM MIND!\pTATE: It raises SP. ATK and...
LIZA: It raises SP. DEF!\pTATE: It's a move that's perfect...
LIZA: For PSYCHIC POKéMON!
data/maps/MossdeepCity_Gym/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_TateAndLizaPostBat: TATE: Looks like the bond between you\nand your POKéMON is far stronger than\lthe bond that we share as twins.\pLIZA: You will become even stronger!\nWe've battled you, so we know.
data/maps/MossdeepCity_Gym/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_TateAndLizaNeedTwo: TATE: Hehehe... Were you surprised?\pLIZA: That there are two GYM LEADERS?\pTATE: Oops, you have only one...\nLIZA: POKéMON that can battle.\pTATE: We can't battle that way!\pLIZA: If you want to challenge us,\nbring some more POKéMON.
data/maps/MossdeepCity_Gym/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_GymStatueCertified: MOSSDEEP CITY POKéMON GYM\pLIZA AND TATE'S CERTIFIED TRAINERS:\n{PLAYER}
